name: Hessians Motorcycle Club
description: American one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded on March 7, 1968, in California by Thomas F. Maniscalco. The club expanded across the western United States and was involved in drug trafficking, murder, robbery, and intimidation. Founder Maniscalco was convicted for three murders related to methamphetamine disputes. The club remains active with chapters in multiple states.

sources.title: Hells Angels MC criminal allegations and incidents — Wikipedia
